note: v302: Statements reconcile — clearer controls & error messages. The row actions now show text labels instead of icon-only buttons that relied on hover tooltips (which never appear on a phone): 'Record' on an unmatched bank line, 'Set aside' on a book record, 'Unlink' on a match, and 'Reconnect' / 'Disconnect' on each bank. Bank pull failures now show plain guidance ('Your bank needs you to sign in again — tap Reconnect…', 'Couldn’t reach the bank — check your connection…') instead of raw error codes, and offer Reconnect when the bank needs re-auth.
